summary: Tested KYC OCR + candidate documents (Aadhaar/PAN) feature end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 new pytest tests pass (/app/backend/tests/test_kyc_ocr.py) covering OCR preview endpoints, candidate creation with KYC fields, document upload/get, role enforcement and _id exclusion. Frontend: Add Candidate modal renders Aadhaar Front+Back upload cards, PAN upload card, both Extract buttons with all data-testid; the candidates table shows new Aadhaar (masked) and PAN columns; Candidate Detail (View) modal renders all KYC fields and the KYC Documents section with 3 lazy 'Load image' tiles that successfully fetch the document binaries via authenticated blob URLs (3/3 blob: URLs created), and click-to-zoom overlay works.
critical_code_review_comments: candidates.py POST /ocr/aadhaar and /ocr/pan: Gemini rejects fully blank images with 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT and the wrapper surfaces it as a 500 'OCR failed: ... Unable to process input image'. Consider catching this specific Gemini BadRequest and returning 422 with a friendly 'Could not read the image — please retry with a clearer photo' so the UI can show a useful toast instead of a generic 500.

candidates.py upload_documents stores base64 strings directly inside MongoDB candidate_documents collection. Each Aadhaar/PAN photo can be 2-5 MB; storing base64 in a single Mongo doc grows unbounded per upsert and exceeds the 16 MB BSON limit if a candidate later uploads HD photos. Recommend GridFS or per-doc separate documents (already keyed by candidate_id but currently a single upserted doc with three fields).

candidates.py /ocr/pan request body uses Pydantic field image_base64: str (required) — supplying empty string is caught by an explicit 400, but a missing key returns a 422 validation error rather than the documented 400. Consider making it Optional with an explicit 400.
candidates.py cand_to_dict mutates the original document (pops _id) — fine here, but be aware in case the dict is reused.
Frontend Candidates.js (~600 lines) is approaching the 700-line guideline. Add Modal + Detail Modal + table rendering could be split for maintainability.
fetchDoc in CandidateDetailModal creates blob URLs but doesn't URL.revokeObjectURL on unmount — minor memory leak after viewing many candidates.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Add modal + Detail modal + blob image fetch + zoom verified)

seed_data_creation: TEST_KYC_<hex> candidate created with Aadhaar/PAN dummy 640x400 JPGs (white card with sample text). Uploaded into candidate_documents collection. Visible as first row in candidates list during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_kyc_ocr.py — important: dummy images for OCR must contain non-trivial visual content; Gemini returns 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT for plain solid-color JPGs. The test uses PIL.ImageDraw to draw shapes/text. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env (already in /app/frontend/.env) to run. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is present in /app/backend/.env. The previous full suite (test_hr_api.py + test_new_features.py) was not re-run in this iteration but has no related changes.
rca_of_issues: No bugs identified — all features implemented and working as specified.
